parsed.production_notes: The main presenter's lip movements are slightly out of sync and unnatural, and her facial expressions remain rigidly smooth, typical of AI video avatars. The app UI screens also feature static AI-generated portraits.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s, slim build, fair complexion, long straight black hair parted in the middle. Facial features are smooth and symmetrical. Wearing a plain black short-sleeve t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Confident, informative, and professional podcast-host vibe.

characters.appearance: Young boy, around 10-12 years old, South Asian descent, short black hair.
characters.wardrobe: White collared shirt, a striped tie, and carrying a black backpack.

characters.appearance: Young woman, South Asian descent, long dark hair, fair complexion.

scenes.setting: Podcast studio, dark background with a blurred sign, a microphone on a boom arm, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman, Character A, sits in a dimly lit podcast studio. She has long straight black hair and wears a plain black short-sleeve t-shirt. She is positioned behind a black studio microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background is dark with warm, blurred lights and a partially visible yellow sign. She looks slightly off-camera to her left, gesturing subtly with her hands as she speaks. The lighting is focused on her, highlighting her face and the front of her black shirt while keeping the background out of focus. The overall composition is a standard medium close-up typical of video podcasts.

scenes.visual_description: The scene opens with a female presenter in a podcast studio setting, speaking directly to the audience about English learning apps. As she talks, dynamic Hindi captions appear on screen, with specific words highlighted in red for emphasis. Briefly, a graphic overlay pops up showing a red cross over the word 'Practice' and a gold trophy over the word 'Learn', illustrating her point about the necessity of practice. The camera remains fixed on the presenter in a medium close-up shot throughout the scene. The warm lighting and blurred background create a professional, intimate atmosphere.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: इंग्लिश सिखाने वाले एप्स तो बहुत हैं। सबने हाईटेक वीडियो बनाये हैं। कम लेकिन क्या इन सब से तुम बोल पाओगे? पॉसिबल ही नहीं है। यह 2026 है और जमाना Ai का है। अगर आज भी आप वही पुराने तरीको से इंग्लिश सीखोगे तो आगे नहीं बढ़ पाओगे। क्योंकि जितने भी विडियोज देख लो, जब तक तुम प्रैक्टिस नहीं करोगे, कभी नहीं सीख पाओगे। हिन्दी भी तुमने आसपास लोगों से बात करके ही सीखी थी।
[There are many English learning apps. Everyone has made high-tech videos. But will you be able to speak with all these? It's not possible at all. This is 2026 and the era is of AI. If even today you learn English using those old methods, you won't be able to move forward. Because no matter how many videos you watch, until you practice, you will never be able to learn. You also learned Hindi by talking to people around you.]
scenes.on_screen_text: इंग्लिश सिखाने वाले एप्स तो बहुत हैं। सबने हाईटेक वीडियो बनाये हैं। कम लेकिन क्या इन सब से तुम बोल पाओगे? पॉसिबल ही नहीं है। यह 2026 है और जमाना Ai का है। अगर आज भी आप वही पुराने तरीको से इंग्लिश सीखोगे तो आगे नहीं बढ़ पाओगे। क्योंकि जितने भी विडियोज देख लो, जब तक तुम प्रैक्टिस नहीं करोगे, कभी नहीं सीख पाओगे। हिन्दी भी तुमने आसपास लोगों से बात करके ही सीखी थी। Practice Learn

scenes.setting: Abstract white background with faint grey symbols.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young boy, Character B, stands on the left side of the frame against a white background patterned with faint, light grey symbols. He is smiling brightly and looking forward. He wears a white collared shirt, a striped tie, and has a black backpack strapped over his shoulders. To his right is a large, stylized smartphone frame. Inside the phone frame, the top half displays a portrait of a young woman, Character C, with long dark hair, smiling gently. The rest of the phone screen is blank white. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a studio promotional shot.

scenes.visual_description: This scene transitions to a promotional graphic introducing the EnglishBhashi app. On the left, a smiling schoolboy stands confidently, representing the target user. On the right, a large smartphone mockup displays the app's interface, featuring an AI teacher named Tiya. The app's logo and a 'Get it on Google Play' badge are prominently displayed above the phone. The background is a clean white with subtle, faded linguistic symbols. The overall layout is designed to clearly showcase the app and its primary AI feature.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: इसलिए मुझे एक ही एप बेस्ट लगता है और वह है इंग्लिशभाषी एप जो कि एक AI पावर्ड लैंग्वेज लर्निंग एप है।
[That's why I find only one app the best and that is the EnglishBhashi app which is an AI powered language learning app.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Say hello to EnglishBhashi The Language Learning App GET IT ON Google Play AI Calling Speak With Tiya Talk about anything Available 24x7 Live Your AI Speaking Teacher Unlimited Practice Instant Feedback Free users can call up to 15 mins a day Talk Now

scenes.setting: Abstract white background with faint grey symbols.

panels.panel_visual_description: A large smartphone frame is centered against a white background patterned with faint, light grey symbols. Inside the phone frame, the top half shows a portrait of a young woman, Character C, with long dark hair, smiling gently. The rest of the phone screen is blank white. The phone frame has a simple, modern design with rounded corners. The background symbols are abstract and unobtrusive. The lighting on the portrait of Character C is soft and flattering.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter briefly reappears to introduce the Tiya AI feature before the video cuts to a full-screen screencast of the app. The app interface displays the 'Speak With Tiya' screen, highlighting the AI teacher's portrait. The screen then transitions to an active call interface, showing a timer and live text transcription of the conversation between the user and the AI. The AI's voice is heard speaking in English, demonstrating the interactive calling feature. The background remains the consistent white pattern with faint symbols.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: इंग्लिशभाषी एप का सबसे यूनीक फीचर है, टीया AI जो आपकी पर्सनल इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग कोच की तरह है। आप 24/7 कभी भी उससे बात कर सकते हो। वह आपको कभी भी जज नहीं करेगी।
[The most unique feature of the EnglishBhashi app is Tiya AI, who is like your personal English speaking coach. You can talk to her anytime 24/7. She will never judge you.]
Character C says: That's a fun challenge, deepak. I'm Tiya & I'm here to chat with you in English. what are you up to today?
[That's a fun challenge, deepak. I'm Tiya & I'm here to chat with you in English. what are you up to today?]
scenes.on_screen_text: AI Calling Speak With Tiya Talk about anything Available 24x7 Live Your AI Speaking Teacher Unlimited Practice Instant Feedback Free users can call up to 15 mins a day Talk Now Tiya Speaking Deepak Wait for Your Turn Ongoing Call 00:24 Tiya Says That's a fun challenge, deepak. I'm Tiya & I'm here to chat with you in English. what are you up to today? HINT I was thinking about AI ethics Chat End Call

scenes.setting: Abstract white background with faint grey symbols.

panels.panel_visual_description: A large smartphone frame is centered against a white background patterned with faint, light grey symbols. Inside the phone frame, there is an illustration of a brown rabbit standing on its hind legs with its front paws raised. The rabbit has a friendly, cartoonish appearance. The rest of the phone screen is blank white. The phone frame maintains its modern, rounded design. The background symbols continue the established visual theme.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter briefly mentions interactive lessons and the ability to talk to real people. The video then cuts to app screencasts demonstrating these features. First, a lesson interface is shown featuring a cartoon rabbit illustration. This is quickly followed by a 'Speak With Co-learner' screen, which lists various online users available for practice calls. The interface shows online status indicators and a button to initiate a call. The background behind the phone frame remains the consistent white pattern.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: और उसके साथ ही इंटरैक्टिव लेसन लर्निंग से लेकर रियल लोगों से बात भी कर सकते हैं। कनेक्ट विद को-लर्नर फीचर यूज करके।
[And along with that, from interactive lesson learning, you can also talk to real people. By using the connect with co-learner feature.]
scenes.on_screen_text: SECTION 1 Unit 1 Lesson 3 आओ सीखें हालचाल पूछना और जवाब देना Next Practice Friends Speak With Co-learner Receive call from Co-learner Active: Other learners can call you now Practice Recent Call Renu Last seen at 4:31 PM Offline Prajapati Vijay Last seen at 4:20 PM Offline pawana Last seen at 4:15 PM Offline Jay bhai Last seen at 4:18 PM Offline Free users can call up to 15 mins a day Speak with co-learner

scenes.setting: Podcast studio, dark background with a blurred sign, a microphone on a boom arm, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman, Character A, sits in a dimly lit podcast studio. She has long straight black hair and wears a plain black short-sleeve t-shirt. She is positioned behind a black studio microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background is dark with warm, blurred lights and a partially visible yellow sign. She looks slightly off-camera to her left, speaking with a confident expression. The lighting is focused on her, highlighting her face and the front of her black shirt. The composition mirrors the opening shot of the video.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter returns to the screen to deliver the final call to action, emphasizing the app's success. A large, animated download counter graphic appears over her, quickly ticking up to 1,000,000. The video then briefly flashes a feedback report screen from the app, showing various skill scores. It cuts back to the presenter for her final words before ending on a full-screen view of the app's Google Play Store page. The Play Store page shows the app icon, screenshots, and an install button, providing a clear path for the user to download the app.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: जिससे आपका कॉन्फिडेंस बिल्ड होगा। अभी तक 10 लाख से भी ज्यादा लोग इंग्लिशभाषी एप यूज करके अपनी इंग्लिश को फ्लुएंट कर चुके हैं। इसलिए वीडियो एप्स छोड़ो और इंग्लिशभाषी डाउनलोड करो।
[Which will build your confidence. So far, more than 10 lakh people have made their English fluent by using the EnglishBhashi app. Therefore, leave video apps and download EnglishBhashi.]
